info.name: Reward Geni - Client Exchange API (Part A)
info.description:
**Client Exchange API — Part A**

This collection documents the API endpoints that Reward Geni exposes for HYBRID clients to call.

## Authentication Flow
1. Use your `cxClientId` and `cxClientSecret` (returned once at client creation) to call `POST /clientapi/generate-token`
2. Use the returned `accessToken` as a Bearer token in subsequent requests

## Base URL
`https://rewardgenixapi.shoppinggeni.com` (update for production)

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Generate a Bearer token to access Client Exchange API endpoints.

request.description:
Exchange your cxClientId and cxClientSecret for an access token.

**Headers:**
- `x-cx-client-id`: Your Client Exchange ID
- `x-cx-client-secret`: Your Client Exchange Secret

**Note:** The raw cxClientSecret is only shown once at client creation. Store it securely.

response.name: Rate Limit Exceeded

item.name: Users
item.description: Create, update, and retrieve end users for your client account.

body.raw:
{
  "users": [
    {
      "userId": "EMP001",
      "fullName": "John Doe",
      "firstName": "John",
      "lastName": "Doe",
      "emailId": "john.doe@example.com",
      "phoneNumber": "9876543210",
      "countryCode": "+91",
      "tier": "Gold",
      "branch": "Mumbai HQ",
      "zone": "West",
      "region": "Maharashtra",
      "memberType": "Employee",                                    // Employee, Manager, etc.
      "status": "ACTIVE",                                            // Allowed: ACTIVE, OFFLINE
      "redemptionStatus": "ENABLED",                                 // Allowed: ENABLED, DISABLED
      "panAvailable": "YES",                                          // Allowed: YES, NO
      "endUserType": "EMPLOYEE",
      "catalogueType": "STANDARD",
      "flex1": "Engineering",
      "flex2": "Team Alpha",
      "flex3": "Manager",
      "flex4": "Shift A",
      "flex5": "Location HQ",
      "flex6": "Tenure 5y",
      "flex7": "Referral Bonus",
      "flex8": "Skill Allowance",
      "flex9": "Travel Reimburse",
      "flex10": "Special Grant",
      "address": {
        "addressLine1": "123 Main Street",
        "addressLine2": "Apt 4B",
        "city": "Mumbai",
        "state": "Maharashtra",
        "pincode": "400001"
      }
    },
    {
      "userId": "EMP002",
      "fullName": "Jane Smith",
      "firstName": "Jane",
      "lastName": "Smith",
      "emailId": "jane.smith@example.com",
      "phoneNumber": "9876543211",
      "countryCode": "+91",
      "tier": "Silver",
      "branch": "Delhi Office",
      "zone": "North",
      "region": "Delhi NCR",
      "memberType": "Employee",                                    // Employee, Manager, etc.
      "status": "ACTIVE",                                            // Allowed: ACTIVE, OFFLINE
      "redemptionStatus": "ENABLED",                                 // Allowed: ENABLED, DISABLED
      "panAvailable": "YES",                                          // Allowed: YES, NO
      "endUserType": "EMPLOYEE",
      "catalogueType": "STANDARD"
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Create multiple end users in a single request.

**Required fields:** userId, fullName, firstName, lastName, emailId, phoneNumber
**Duplicate handling:** If a user with the same userId or emailId already exists, that entry is skipped.

response.name: Partial Failure (Duplicate)
Rate Limit Exceeded

request.description: Update existing end users. Only the fields provided will be updated (partial update). Users are identified by their `userId` (externalUserId).

response.name: Partial Failure (User Not Found)
Rate Limit Exceeded

query.description: Search by name, email, phone, or userId

request.description: Retrieve end users for your client account with pagination and search.

response.name: Success - Full User Data
